# FAOS Skills for Gemini CLI

> Exported on 2026-03-13 | 520 skills

## Overview

This directory contains FAOS custom skills exported for use in Gemini CLI.
Each skill is a TOML command file in the `commands/` subdirectory.

| Domain | Count |

| cloud | 99 |
| ai-research | 85 |

| integrations | 14 |

## Installation

### Option 1: Copy to Project (Recommended)
1. Copy the `commands/` directory into `.gemini/commands/` at your project root
2. Gemini CLI auto-discovers all `.toml` files
3. Skills are available as `/faos-skill-{name}` commands

```bash
# Copy all FAOS skills to your project
cp export/gemini/commands/faos-skill-*.toml .gemini/commands/

# Or selectively copy specific skills
cp export/gemini/commands/faos-skill-dev-story.toml .gemini/commands/
```

### Option 2: Global Installation
1. Copy TOML files to `~/.gemini/commands/` for availability across all projects

### Option 3: Cherry-Pick
1. Browse the `commands/` directory for skills relevant to your workflow
2. Copy individual `.toml` files to `.gemini/commands/`

## Important Notes

- Each skill is a TOML file with `description` and `prompt` fields
- Skills are invoked as slash commands: `/faos-skill-{name}`
- Gemini handles all orchestration internally — no sub-agent support
- Skills with multi-agent instructions have been annotated with platform notes
- These are separate from FAOS agent commands (e.g., `/faos-dev`, `/faos-ceo`)

## Source

These skills are exported from the [FAOS Agent Framework](https://github.com/frank-luongt/Foundation-AgenticOS)
using `scripts/export-skills.py`. The source of truth is `.faos/custom/skills/`.
